notes: Fictional demo data for Trophy Oracle v1. These records are designed to test the local AI pipeline and cross-platform achievements contract.

games.title: Stellar Drift
games.summary: A fast sci-fi racer with a linear campaign, several chapter-specific route achievements, and a late-game collectible cleanup.

achievements.name: First Burn
achievements.description: Complete the opening tutorial race.
achievements.evidence: Tutorial completion is mandatory before chapter selection unlocks.

achievements.name: Orbit Breaker
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 3 by taking the asteroid belt shortcut.
achievements.evidence: The asteroid shortcut only appears during Chapter 3 and cannot be replayed after accepting the Chapter 4 sponsor contract.
achievements.spoilerSafeHint: A Chapter 3 route choice becomes unavailable after a later campaign commitment.
achievements.warning: Take the asteroid belt route before signing the Chapter 4 sponsor contract.

achievements.name: Clean Lines
achievements.description: Win any campaign race without touching a wall.
achievements.evidence: Can be attempted on any replayable campaign race after the tutorial.

achievements.name: Signal Collector
achievements.description: Recover all 48 lost telemetry beacons.
achievements.evidence: Telemetry beacons remain accessible after the finale through free roam.

achievements.name: Platinum Vector
achievements.description: Unlock every Stellar Drift trophy.
achievements.evidence: Platinum unlocks after all non-platinum trophies are complete.

achievements.name: First Burn

achievements.evidence: Tutorial completion is mandatory before chapter selection unlocks.

achievements.name: Orbit Breaker
achievements.description: Finish Chapter 3 by taking the asteroid belt shortcut.
achievements.evidence: The asteroid shortcut only appears during Chapter 3 and cannot be replayed after accepting the Chapter 4 sponsor contract.
achievements.spoilerSafeHint: A Chapter 3 route choice becomes unavailable after a later campaign commitment.
achievements.warning: Take the asteroid belt route before signing the Chapter 4 sponsor contract.

achievements.name: Clean Lines
achievements.description: Win any campaign race without touching a wall.
achievements.evidence: Can be attempted on any replayable campaign race after the tutorial.

achievements.name: Signal Collector
achievements.description: Recover all 48 lost telemetry beacons.
achievements.evidence: Telemetry beacons remain accessible after the finale through free roam.

achievements.name: 100% Vector
achievements.description: Unlock every Stellar Drift Steam achievement.
achievements.evidence: 100% unlocks after all non-completion achievements are complete.

games.title: Myth Harbor
games.summary: A narrative adventure with safe story achievements, relationship missables, and post-game folklore collectibles.

achievements.name: Lantern Lit
achievements.description: Arrive at the harbor and light the old watch lantern.
achievements.evidence: The lantern event is the first mandatory story interaction.

achievements.name: A Promise Kept
achievements.description: Return Mira's compass before the tide festival.
achievements.evidence: Mira leaves the harbor after the tide festival begins, making the compass return unavailable.
achievements.spoilerSafeHint: A harbor relationship task must be completed before a major festival sequence begins.
achievements.warning: Give Mira the compass before starting the tide festival sequence.

achievements.name: No Empty Nets
achievements.description: Help every fisher in one morning route.
achievements.evidence: The morning route can be replayed from the chapter select after finishing the story.
achievements.spoilerSafeHint: A replayable morning route requires helping each participant in one run.

achievements.name: Folklore Archivist
achievements.description: Collect all 36 myth tablets.
achievements.evidence: All myth tablets are available in post-game harbor free roam.

achievements.name: Harbor Oracle
achievements.description: Unlock every Myth Harbor trophy.
achievements.evidence: Platinum unlocks after all non-platinum trophies are complete.

games.title: Ashen Circuit
games.summary: A tactical arena game with a short campaign, difficulty achievements, optional online duels, and a weapon mastery grind.

achievements.name: Ignition Test
achievements.description: Clear the first arena trial.
achievements.evidence: The first arena trial is mandatory and starts the campaign ladder.

achievements.name: Mercy Protocol
achievements.description: Spare the rival pilot at the end of Arena 5.
achievements.evidence: The rival pilot decision happens once in Arena 5. Choosing execute locks the save out of this achievement.
achievements.spoilerSafeHint: A one-time Arena 5 decision determines whether this achievement remains available.
achievements.warning: Choose spare at the Arena 5 decision prompt.

achievements.name: Hard Reset
achievements.description: Complete the campaign on Veteran difficulty.
achievements.evidence: Veteran difficulty can be selected for a new campaign run after the first clear.

achievements.name: Weapon Memory
achievements.description: Reach mastery rank 10 with all six weapon frames.
achievements.evidence: Weapon mastery progress carries into post-game arena replays.
achievements.spoilerSafeHint: Six weapon frames must each reach the required mastery rank.

achievements.name: Duelist Ping
achievements.description: Complete online duels.
achievements.evidence: Online duel requires network matchmaking but does not affect campaign progression.
achievements.spoilerSafeHint: An optional online activity uses network matchmaking and does not affect campaign progress.
achievements.warning: Online availability should be checked before committing to full completion.

achievements.name: Circuit Sovereign
achievements.description: Unlock every Ashen Circuit achievement.
achievements.evidence: 100% unlocks after all non-completion achievements are complete.
